page.body:
XF_OPTIONPAD_START
XF_OPTIONPAD_GROUP_TITLE(ZZ - Zwroty zewnętrzny,7)
XF_OPTIONPAD_GROUP_START #ifdef ENABLE_DB11 XF_OPTIONPAD_ITEM(Nowy,PICTURE_CHOICE_N5DOKMAG, OPEN_FORM_PROXY_HLI(TYPEID_N5DOKMAG,0) appvar_rejestr_typ=N5REJESTRDOK__ZZ varCursor=CRSR_DOKMAG_PO_REJ vn8024="N5REJESTRDOK__WZ") #else XF_OPTIONPAD_ITEM(Nowy,PICTURE_CHOICE_N5DOKMAG, OPEN_FORM_PROXY_HLI(TYPEID_N5DOKMAG,0) appvar_rejestr_typ=N5REJESTRDOK__ZZ varCursor=CRSR_DOKMAG_PO_REJ) #endif XF_OPTIONPAD_ITEM_SEPARATOR XF_OPTIONPAD_ITEM(Przeglądaj, PICTURE_CHOICE_N5DOKMAG, OPEN_FORM_PROXY_HLI(TYPEID_N5DOKMAG,0) appvar_rejestr_typ=N5REJESTRDOK__ZZ varCursor=CRSR_DOKMAG_PO_REJ appvar_pop_dokument=-1)
XF_OPTIONPAD_GROUP_END
XF_OPTIONPAD_END
XFBACK(Wstecz)
